program_name: SHARAN’s Six Weeks to Health Gain & Weight Loss Online Program
short_description: To know more details about this course click here
full_text: To know more details about this course click here No animal in nature is overweight, but obesity is not uncommon amongst human beings. We often diet to lose weight, but it rarely works only because when you are dieting all that you are thinking about is food! By following SHARAN’s guidelines, which are according to our own natural instincts, it’s easy to lose weight and gain health without dieting. In fact you will never need to remain hungry. And you will gain health as a bonus. This systematically designed pre-recorded online program will help you understand the areas you need to work upon, and will guide you on how to make the changes over 6 weeks Each week of this special course is divided into different themes, with specific goals. The program is designed in such a way that the whole week is focussed upon achieving the target of the week. The first two weeks specifically focus on the changes that you need to make in your food and cooking, which is then followed by other aspects, that include exercise, mental fitness, conditioning and more. Whether you are a beginner or an expert in cooking, you will find it easy to adapt to this new format of cooking which is simple and do able. This program is also suitable for working professionals as the focus is on ease and taste. You may wonder what will happen if your family isn’t interested or when you travel or eat out or at someone’s house. Worry not, as all the solutions are provided. The program is designed in a workshop mode, so you will be suggested to do easy and fun activities that will help you reach your goals. You will be guided how to prep up your pantry, how to be mindful about cooking and eating too, how to stretch before exercising and even how to exercise when you don’t have the time to! If what is prescribed in the program is adhered to, then weight loss and health gain is guaranteed. Our participants have lost anywhere between 4 kilos to even 14 kilos in the span of six weeks! Inch loss happens almost automatically. The program can be done at your own pace as it’s a pre-recorded one, so you can log in at any time of your choice. We suggest you fix the tentative time so that you have a routine. You will watch videos by our facilitators who have personally followed this method themselves and benefitted. They will guide you on your journey to your and your family’s wellness. Please note that there is no live support available on this program. If you do follow the guidelines, then health gain and weight loss is guaranteed. 1) This can be done at your own pace and time. 2) You will learn, unlearn and relearn a lot about health. 3) Cooking techniques and recipe ideas are included. 4) You will view tips and tricks which you can easily implement in your daily life. 5) There are fun activities and film suggestions ‘Thank you so much for this beautiful online program. I liked the way it started from the basics and covered all the aspects of health. The short videos motivated me. The quizzes summed up the topic and the recipes, DIY tips were very useful and informative. I have benefitted in many ways. I am equipped with the right knowledge, relieved of my problem of constipation. I have shifted from non vegetarian to vegetarian and lost 8 kilos so far. I now start my day with smoothies. I have even decided to do further studies in plant based nutrition and start my home based business in vegan snacks! Wishing SHARAN all the very best for your wonderful work and contribution in inspiring and helping many others like me to lead a happy and disease-free life. – Sri Gowri Note : The moment you register, the program will begin. You will get a link, a log-in id and password, and the program will be available according to the package you have chosen – Silver/Gold/Platinum. In case after registration, you do not receive an email from us, please check your spam. If you have any problems email info@sharan-india.org with details. For queries related to this program or any difficulty in registering, contact office@sharan-india.org or call/WhatsApp Nupur +91 9167572123 or Roza +91 9769117747 . They will assist you. Platinum Membership Valid for 4 months from date of registration Gold Membership Valid for 3 months from date of registration. *18% GST will be added Silver Membership Valid for 2 months from date of registration Thank you for registering. Please check your email for the confirmation. You have already registered for this event.

short_description: SHARAN’s 21-day online diabetes reversal program is a pre-recorded online program designed to teach you how diabetes, both Type 1 and Type 2, can be reversed with lifestyle changes. It contains 3 preparatory days and 21 more days of learning and doing. On each day you will learn a new lifestyle change that you need to put into practice so that by the end of 21 days you will be practicing a healthy lifestyle that will enable you to reverse diabetes without any medicines.
full_text: SHARAN’s 21-day online diabetes reversal program is a pre-recorded online program designed to teach you how diabetes, both Type 1 and Type 2, can be reversed with lifestyle changes. It contains 3 preparatory days and 21 more days of learning and doing. On each day you will learn a new lifestyle change that you need to put into practice so that by the end of 21 days you will be practicing a healthy lifestyle that will enable you to reverse diabetes without any medicines. While Type 2 diabetes can potentially be reversed quickly, Type 1 diabetes does take a number of years to reverse. However you will find improvements almost immediately even in Type 1 diabetes, and by following the program insulin dosages should fall to half or even one third. It takes 21 days to change a habit. All you need is to devote a half to one hour every day towards learning and practicing, and soon it will become a habit. We have videos and short texts for every day to help you learn audio visually, all in the comfort of your home. You will also see inspiring testimonials of people who have got better during our 21 day residential programs. On each day you will also be given, as an optional bonus, suggestions of highly recommended films that you can see to understand the topic of the day even better. And most importantly you will see differences on all levels, not just in diabetes, but also in concurrent health problems. If your family members join you in making changes not only will they be supporting you, but they too will reap the benefits!. You will also have the option be able to track your own progress in the program through an inbuilt progress chart. Incase you are too busy, you can extend this learning over a longer period. You have 2 choices of plans that you can purchase depending on the time you feel that you will need. And there is an extension plan too, should you need to extend. What is important is to make it sustainable, learn more while you do it and enjoy it! This program does not include live support. If you are on many medications you may find that it’s helpful to register for our consultations while you are on the program so that a medical doctor can help you reduce medications as you improve. So if you are ready to dive in and join us on this journey of health, please register now. NOTE: In-case after registration, if you do not receive an email from us, please check your spam. If you have any problems email info@sharan-india.org with details. For queries related to this recording or any difficulty in registering, contact office@sharan-india.org or call/WhatsApp Nupur +91 9167572123 or Roza +91 9769117747 . They will assist you. This is what our participants have shared… My HbA1c came down to 6.2 from 7.3 in three months. I have lost about 11lbs since I started the program and my energy levels are up.I liked that the new diet changes were introduced slowly one at a time, which made it easy to follow. The program also helped me figure out which food caused my sugar spike and how to rectify my diet. – Aparna Rajiv I have been able to reduce my insulin from 20 units at the start of the program to 4 units at the end of 21 days and stopped one medicine. My BP medicine dosage has been reduced and I have lost about 3-4 kgs weight in this period. The first thing I liked about this programme was that it was gradual and was extremely doable. Moreover, the results were there to see in the very first week itself! Plus the recipes are really tasty and helped me to forego my earlier diet. Thanks SHARAN for a wonderful 21-day program which has really changed my life forever. – Neelakantan I made great progress in reducing my sugar levels and am feeling more rejuvenated and energetic during the entire day. Overall it has been a great learning experience to go the ‘Plant based Diet’ way. The connection between, what we eat and our mental state is very clearly explained. Providing plant based recipes and alternate foods to dairy is greatly beneficial. I also learned the real cause of Diabetes, and will stay away from fat and oil forever. Thank you SHARAN for a great 21 day programme . – Uday Masturlal GOLD – 90 days complete access. *18% GST will be added SILVER – 60 days complete access *18% GST will be added Thank you for registering. Please check your email for the confirmation. You have already registered for this event.

short_description: Here’s a perfect course to understand the techniques and nuances of healthy cooking. Everything from setting up your kitchen (home or professional), meal planning, techniques to empower you to cook your favourite dishes without the use of oil , sugar or dairy. We will cover all the basics of Plant-based cuisine, including yogurt, cheese, butter and much more.
full_text: Here’s a perfect course to understand the techniques and nuances of healthy cooking. Everything from setting up your kitchen (home or professional), meal planning, techniques to empower you to cook your favourite dishes without the use of oil , sugar or dairy. We will cover all the basics of Plant-based cuisine, including yogurt, cheese, butter and much more. Do you want to eat right in order to get healthy again? How do you set up your kitchen for health? How to cook delicious food without oil or make desserts without sugar? What should you eat in every meal? How can you learn techniques that will get you started to make anything that you like in a healthy without spending too much time? Learn to make your own plant based yoghurts, cheese and more! Professionals: Whole food plant based diet is considered a food trend for 2020, and if you’re a restauranteur, chef or a culinary student, this is especially a great course for you to get acquainted with the basics of plant based cuisine, cooked with only whole ingredients. Anyone looking to get healthier. We have had people from all walks of life, who are keen to make the shift in their diet to get healthier for themselves, make a positive impact on the environment and animal welfare. The Whole Plant-Based Techniques Cooking Class is a prerecorded program that will take 2- 4 hours to view. You will have it for 30 days from the time of registration so that you can view and review whenever you like. This will enable you to understand, practice, and perfect the techniques of healthy whole plant-based cooking that is oil-free, sugar- free and dairy-free, so that you truly enjoy eating healthy. At the end of the program you will receive a Certificate when you fill in the feedback form. Here is the short video describing about this program NOTE : Incase after registration, you do not receive an email from us, please check your spam. short_description: सम्पूर्ण वनस्पति आधारित व्यंजन बनाने की विधि सिखने का ऑनलाइन सर्टिफ़िकेट कोर्
full_text: सम्पूर्ण वनस्पति आधारित व्यंजन बनाने की विधि सिखने का ऑनलाइन सर्टिफ़िकेट कोर् स्वस्थ तरीक़े से खाना पकाने की तकनीक और बारीकियों को समझने के लिए यह एक सही कार्यक्रम है। अपनी रसोई (घर या व्यावसायिक) की स्थापना, आपके प्रति दिन के प्रति प्रहर के भोजन बनाने सम्पूर्ण वनस्पति आधारित व्यंजन बनाने की विधि सिखने का ऑनलाइन सर्टिफ़िकेट कोर्स स्वस्थ तरीक़े से खाना पकाने की तकनीक और बारीकियों को समझने के लिए यह एक सही कार्यक्रम है। अपनी रसोई (घर या व्यावसायिक) की स्थापना, आपके प्रति दिन के प्रति प्रहर के भोजन बनाने की तैयारी, तेल, चीनी या डेयरी यानि दूध के उपयोग के बिना अपने पसंदीदा व्यंजन पकाने के लिए आपको सशक्त बनाने की तकनीक इस कार्यकर्म में मिलेगी । हम दही, पनीर, मक्खन और बहुत कुछ पेड़ पोधो पर आधारित व्यंजनों के सभी मूल प्रकार को कवर करेंगे। क्या आप फिर से स्वस्थ होने के लिए सही खाना चाहते हैं? आप स्वास्थ्य के लिए अपनी रसोई कैसे स्थापित करते हैं? बिना तेल के स्वादिष्ट भोजन कैसे पकाएं या बिना चीनी के मिठाई बनाएं? आपको हर बार के भोजन में क्या खाना चाहिए? आप ऐसी तकनीकें कैसे सीख सकते हैं जो आपको कुछ भी स्वास्थवर्धक बनाने के लिए तैयार कर देगी और बहुत अधिक समय बिताऐ बिना? आप यहाँ सिखेंगे वनस्पति आधारित यानि बिना दूध की दही, पनीर और और बहुत कुछ 1. प्रौफ़ेशनल: संपूर्ण वनस्पति आधारित आहार को 2020 के लिए एक खाद्य प्रवृत्ति माना गया है, और यदि आप एक रेस्तरां,(जलपान गृह) रसोइया या पाक छात्र हैं, तो यह विशेष रूप से आपके लिए पौधे आधारित व्यंजनों की मूल बातों से परिचित होने के लिए एक बढ़िया कोर्स है: केवल सम्पूर्ण सामग्री के साथ पकाया जाता है। 2. कोई भी व्यक्ति जो स्वस्थ होना चाहते है । हमारे पास जीवन के सभी क्षेत्रों के लोग हैं, जो अपने स्वास्थ को ठीक करने के लिए अपने आहार में बदलाव करने के इच्छुक हैं, पर्यावरण और पशु कल्याण पर सकारात्मक प्रभाव डालते हैं। शरन बेसिक ऑनलाइन कुकिंग सर्टिफिकेट कोर्स एक पूर्व निर्धारित कार्यक्रम है जिसे देखने के लिए 2- 4 घंटे का समय लगेगा। आपके पास पंजीकरण के समय से 30 दिनों के लिए होगा ताकि आप जब चाहें देख सकें और समीक्षा कर सकें। यह आपको स्वस्थ, पूरे सम्पूर्ण वनस्पति आधारित खाना पकाने की तकनीकों को समझने, अभ्यास करने और परिपूर्ण करने में सक्षम करेगा जो कि तेल-मुक्त, चीनी मुक्त और डेयरी-मुक्त है, ताकि आप वास्तव में स्वस्थ खाने का आनंद लें सके। जब आप फीडबैक फॉर्म भरेंगे तो कार्यक्रम के अंत में आपको एक प्रमाणपत्र प्राप्त होगा। यहाँ इस कार्यक्रम के बारे में वर्णन करने वाला छोटा वीडियो है नोट: यदि इस क्लास से जुड़े कोई प्रश्न हों या रजिस्ट्रेशन में कोई परेशानी हो, तो office@sharan-india.org पर संपर्क करें या नुपुर (+91 9167572123) या रोजा (+91 9769117747) को कॉल/व्हाट्सऐप करें। वे आपकी सहायता करेंगी। 1 Month (30 Days) *18% GST will be added Thank you for registering. Please check your email for the confirmation. You have already registered for this event.

program_name: Cancer Support Group – Q&A with Cancer Thriver Jaishree K
short_description: A note from our facilitator Jaishree Kannan;
full_text: A note from our facilitator Jaishree Kannan; Every Wednesday join me on a journey of healing and empowerment! As I reflect on my own path of overcoming cancer and embracing a life of vibrant health, I am filled with gratitude for the support and wisdom I’ve received along the way. It’s been over 13 years since I embarked on this journey, guided by the transformative teachings of Louise L. Hay and other great spiritual masters and the nourishing embrace of a whole plant-based lifestyle. I’ve come to realize that healing is not just about addressing the physical, but about tending to the deepest layers of our being – releasing resentment, fear, and self-criticism – and embracing forgiveness and self-love. It’s a journey of holistic wellness that extends far beyond the boundaries of the body. In honour of this journey and with immense gratitude for the healing I’ve experienced, I am excited to announce free weekly Q&A sessions for anyone navigating the challenges of cancer. Whether you’re seeking guidance, inspiration, or simply looking for a supportive community to lean on, you’re warmly invited to join us. Contribution: This is a Free Event but registration is must This is a free event which doesn’t require a login or creating an account, so you can directly register from the given link. Please read the following details carefully As you proceed to register, you will receive a Google form to be filled up. Once you submit the Google form, a box will appear with a message and a WhatsApp link to join the group. Please click the link & join the group directly. If you do not see this, please check your promotion/spam folder and white list our address to avoid missing future emails by dragging it into your primary mailbox and adding us to your contact list All further details/Zoom links will be shared in the WhatsApp Group. No recording will be available for this weekly event. Note: For queries related to this program or any difficulty in registering, contact office@sharan-india.org or call/WhatsApp Nupur +91 9167572123 or Roza +91 9769117747 . They will assist you. Thank you for registering. Please check your email for the confirmation. You have already registered for this event.

short_description: Our thoughts form the foundation of our health and happiness. SHARAN brings you a host of book readings geared towards improving your thoughts and in turn helping you heal.
full_text: Our thoughts form the foundation of our health and happiness. SHARAN brings you a host of book readings geared towards improving your thoughts and in turn helping you heal. These book reading sessions have proven to be beneficial for personal growth and well-being, offering insights, strategies and practical skills to improve various aspects of life. The reason we keep reading Sister Shivani’s books is because they are bringing results, and the more we read and re-read, we keep getting better and better. Please note that this is not religious and the whole idea is to build our inner strength. You are welcome to attend as many book readings as you like. Even if you join midway, it helps:) Being Love, Creating Beautiful Relationships – every Tuesday from 11:00 AM to 12:00 PM IST Online Link to purchase the book – Amazon – Click here Inner Beauty – every Wednesday, 4:30 PM to 5:30 PM IST Live in Andheri (W) Mumbai The Power of One Thought : Master Your Mind, Master Your Life – starting 26th February, every Thursday, 5:00 PM to 6:00 PM IST Online Link to purchase the book – Click here Being Love – every Saturday, 6:00 AM to 6:45 AM IST Online Link to purchase the book – Click here Let’s grow healthier & happier together… Contribution: Kindly note that the only contribution we seek from you is CONSISTENCY & willingness to work on yourself. So only if you will be able to attend all sessions and do the work required, then commit to it. As soon as you register, you will receive a confirmation mail with links to join WhatsApp groups. Please note that these are all ongoing book readings and keeps repeating. The beauty is that you can join anytime and still get all the benefits Please join relevant WhatsApp Group/s of your interest to start this journey of being a better human being. Session Zoom links will be shared in the WhatsApp group itself. short_description: Many of us love comfort foods like bagels, mac and cheese, and baked treats. They are familiar, satisfying, and bring a sense of indulgence. But once we begin paying attention to our health, these foods often start to feel too heavy or full of refined ingredients like gluten, oil, and sugar.
full_text: Many of us love comfort foods like bagels, mac and cheese, and baked treats. They are familiar, satisfying, and bring a sense of indulgence. But once we begin paying attention to our health, these foods often start to feel too heavy or full of refined ingredients like gluten, oil, and sugar. It can sometimes feel like we have to choose between enjoying these favourites and eating in a way that feels nourishing. In reality, what’s often missing is simply a different way of preparing them. In this 2-hour live cooking session, you will learn how to recreate familiar American classics using wholesome plant-based ingredients, while keeping everything gluten-free, oil-free, and refined sugar-free. The recipes are designed to retain the flavour, texture, and comfort of the originals while making them lighter and nourishing. Whether you are new to whole-food plant-based cooking or looking to expand your recipe collection, this class will offer practical ideas and techniques that you can easily use in your own kitchen. Date: Wednesday, 1st April 2026 Time: 11:30 AM – 1:30 PM IST Location: Live on Zoom If you are here for the first time, please Sign up to create your account. short_description: Mango season brings with it the perfect opportunity to preserve its tangy goodness in timeless, traditional ways. Raw mango pickles have been a cherished part of Indian kitchens for generations, though they are often made with excess oil or preservatives for longer shelf life.
full_text: Mango season brings with it the perfect opportunity to preserve its tangy goodness in timeless, traditional ways. Raw mango pickles have been a cherished part of Indian kitchens for generations, though they are often made with excess oil or preservatives for longer shelf life. In this special class, presenter Palak Jain will show you how to create a range of oil-free raw mango pickles using heirloom family recipes. Thoughtfully adapted to suit a whole food, plant-based lifestyle, these recipes are both wholesome and easy to recreate in your own kitchen. Learn simple, practical techniques that help you enjoy authentic flavours without relying on oil or preservatives. short_description: Curd is a staple in most Indian homes—whether it’s enjoyed as chaas, raita, in curries, or with rice. While dairy curd is commonly used, it’s not something human bodies truly need. The good news is that delicious, satisfying alternatives can be made easily at home.
full_text: Curd is a staple in most Indian homes—whether it’s enjoyed as chaas, raita, in curries, or with rice. While dairy curd is commonly used, it’s not something human bodies truly need. The good news is that delicious, satisfying alternatives can be made easily at home. In this special class, you will learn how to prepare a variety of plant-based curds using simple ingredients and tried-and-tested methods. These recipes are free from preservatives, easy to make, and can be stored in the refrigerator for up to 10 days. Once you start making these at home, you may find you don’t miss dairy curd at all. short_description: As we age, many people suffer from aches and pains in the joints and back, etc. Some people think that this is natural with age, others believe that an oil free diet could be harmful because there’s no lubrication. Headaches and migraines are another form of pains.
full_text: As we age, many people suffer from aches and pains in the joints and back, etc. Some people think that this is natural with age, others believe that an oil free diet could be harmful because there’s no lubrication. Headaches and migraines are another form of pains. Sadly, painkillers help only temporarily but don’t solve the problem and they have their own side-effects. But there is a way out. The right food, the right lifestyle can make a huge impact. Are you willing to make the changes? Join this free talk with Dr. Nandita Shah to get a few tips on how you can recharge your health and get rid of aches and pains and even migraines. Tuesday, 21st April 2026 7:00 PM – 8:00 PM IST + Q & A Live on Zoom For any queries or difficulty in registering, please contact: office@sharan-india.org Nupur: +91 9167572123 Roza: +91 9769117747 Thank you for registering. full_text: In association with the beautiful souls of Ubuntu, SHARAN is happy to announce our potluck meet at Ghatkopar West. Our potluck meets are all about coming together, meeting new people, exchanging ideas, and enjoying simple, wholesome food in a warm, friendly space. Whether you’re new to our community or have joined us before, you’re welcome to come along with your family or friends. Just bring one homemade dish to share (for about 5–8 people) that is free from animal products (including milk), refined sugar and oil and preferably organic. These potluck meets are relaxed, joyful gatherings where conversations flow as easily as the food, and everyone leaves feeling lighter and inspired. program_name: Heal with Pen — A 21-Day Guided Writing & Reflection Journey
short_description: Emotional Clarity. Mindful Living. Lasting Change.
full_text: Emotional Clarity. Mindful Living. Lasting Change. In a world of constant noise and speed, Heal with Pen offers a quiet yet powerful space for personal transformation. This 21-day journey invites you to reflect, write, and reconnect with yourself — one page at a time. Whether you’re feeling overwhelmed, lost, or just seeking a deeper connection with yourself, this course will gently guide you toward healing and self-awareness. Daily guided live Zoom sessions (Mon–Sat) Writing prompts and reflections for each day A supportive WhatsApp community for sharing and insights Access to session recordings if you miss a live class Guided themes exploring emotions, beliefs, fears, and strengths Real testimonials and transformation stories Start each morning with mindful writing, deep reflection, and group support Be part of an intimate group guided by Capt. Joseph Pinto’s heartfelt mentorship Join a dedicated WhatsApp group for updates and shared experiences All session recordings will be shared in the WhatsApp group Continue your writing practice at your own pace, even if you miss a session Clear the Mental Clutter: Just like we clean our bodies daily, it’s time we clean our minds too Tap Into Self-Awareness: Writing helps unlock clarity, confidence, and emotional balance Real Community, Real Growth: Connect with others on a shared path of self-discovery Gentle Guidance: Capt. Joseph Pinto is your friend, mentor, and compassionate navigator throughout this journey Hi Captain Good Morning! Before I started the program with you. I used to feel stuck suffocated and a constant thought of giving up was there. But as of today, I woke in a morning with an intention of having a beautiful day with my daughters and husband. My heart is grateful for being coached by you. You have an amazing way of helping us understand the things and also help us understand. You are like a navigator of our life. Thank you… Have an amazing day. I am Work in progress ~ Ramya Thank you for listening yesterday and addressing how to deal with that pain in today’s class Captain 🙏🏼 ~ Sonia Dates: 4th May – 30th May 2026 Time: 5:30 AM – 6:15 AM IST (Mon–Sat) No sessions on: Sundays (10th, 17th, 24th May) Format: Daily Live Zoom Sessions + WhatsApp Support Contribution: ₹1600 + 18% GST Registration closes: 8th May 2026, 4:00 PM IST Sign up or log in to your SHARAN account Complete your contribution via Instamojo (SHARAN account) Watch for a confirmation email and check your promotions/spam folder in case you don’t see our email You will be added to a WhatsApp group one day before the program, for all Zoom links and updates For queries or registration support: office@sharan-india.org +91 9769117747 +91 7499417038 Thank you for registering. full_text: Date: Wednesday, 6th May to Tuesday, 12th May 2026 (7 sessions) Venue: Live on Zoom with WhatsApp support Your hair is not the problem… It is a reflection of your internal health. Are you experiencing hair fall, thinning, dullness, or early greying—despite trying different products and remedies? Root to Radiance: 7-Day Hair Healing is a guided online journey designed by a Whole Food Plant-Based Nutritionist and a Health Coach to help you address the real causes of hair concerns—by healing your body from within. Because true radiance doesn’t come from what you apply outside… It begins from within. Understanding hair anatomy and root causes of hair fall Improving digestion, gut health, and nutrient absorption Building iron, protein, and essential nutrients naturally Supporting blood building and circulation Reducing stress and supporting nervous system balance Simple, sustainable, chemical-free hair care Interactive Q&A for personalised clarity You will begin to notice a shift—not just in your hair, but in your overall well-being. You may feel lighter, more energised, and more in tune with your body. Instead of chasing quick fixes, you start building a system that supports lasting health and natural radiance. This is not a hair care course. This is a root-cause reversal program. short_description: This structured online journey is guided by Medical Intuitive and Holistic Health & Wellness Practitioner Mona Irfan.
full_text: This structured online journey is guided by Medical Intuitive and Holistic Health & Wellness Practitioner Mona Irfan. Recognise energetic and emotional blocks Release patterns held in your own consciousness Let go of emotional baggage that may not belong to you Through guided practices like tapping (EFT), belief and feeling work (Theta), Holy Fire Reiki, colour scanning, breathwork, and reflection, you move step by step — not all at once. This is not about “fixing” yourself. It is about creating the right inner conditions for clarity and strength to emerge. Phase 1: Awareness – Acknowledge – Action See how your thoughts shape your emotions and energy. Through reflection, meditation, and tapping, begin shifting patterns consciously. Before: Reacting automatically to triggers. After: Responding with awareness. Use breathwork, forgiveness practices, and belief release work to clear emotional residue. Before: Carrying heaviness without knowing why. After: Feeling lighter, calmer, more balanced. Phase 3: Mind – Movement – Manifestation Integrate your new awareness. Raise your inner vibration. Align your chakras. Take inspired, practical action toward your aspirations. Before: Wanting change but feeling stuck. After: Moving forward with clarity and intention. Practical tools to navigate your emotions Greater awareness of your thought patterns A stronger connection with your intuition The confidence to consciously shape your 2026 Daily live sessions (except Sundays: 17, 24 & 31st May) A dedicated WhatsApp group for all communication and updates Instead of entering the new year feeling overwhelmed, you step in feeling grounded and empowered. A 30-minute one-on-one personal session for each participant. No recordings will be shared. This is a live on Zoom, shared experience. program_name: Inspiring Stories to Shape Young Minds
short_description: Every parent wishes to nurture children who are kind, compassionate, and guided by strong values. One of the most beautiful and effective ways to plant these seeds is through storytelling.
full_text: Every parent wishes to nurture children who are kind, compassionate, and guided by strong values. One of the most beautiful and effective ways to plant these seeds is through storytelling. Join us for a special 7-day series where children will be immersed in inspiring stories from our ancient heritage—stories of kings, courage, wisdom, and righteousness. These timeless tales gently instil values like integrity, empathy, and faith, while sparking imagination and curiosity. Each session will also include simple yogic breathing and moments of silence to help children relax, focus, and connect with themselves. A new story unfolds every day, making each session fresh, engaging, and meaningful for young minds. In case a child is unable to attend a live session, recordings will be shared in a parents-only WhatsApp group with 24-hour access. Alka Sahay – It was a different kind of exposure for my kids where they could relate to you not as a teacher but as story teller aunty like someone from the family. Within 30 mins it was not easy to manage different activities with kids but you could manage it in the right way. It came out as a sweet and soft refresher program. The kids got involved in the program. It was very pleasant to see my kids especially Alaukik, sitting silently without moving here and there during the silence session. Thank you very much. Wish to participate in many more programs like this!! Ashwini (Vibha’s mother) – Good morning… Sharmila ji, firstly I would like to thank you for the sessions you conducted, your narration, engagement with the kids and summarisation in the end along with discussing the meaning/moral of the story and the silent time in the end was very well done. Vibha when asked how she liked the sessions said that she had enjoyed all the stories and these were the kind of stories she would not read/listen to generally. Even though she knew a couple of stories yet I could see her interest and enthusiasm in attending the sessions, so much so that even though she was travelling yesterday, she insisted that she attended it ! All in all, it was a beautiful experience for all of us. Thank you once again Radhika (Sean Arvind’s mother) – Thank you for your patience with us. We are so new in these teachings, you summarizing these stories and morals is helpful, also asking questions to the children. We really liked the emphasis on protecting animals. We appreciate you very much for offering this. Another idea is a class of ways to protect the environment and projects. Dates: Friday, 15th May to Thursday, 21st May 2026 ( 7 days ) Age Group: 7 to 13 years ( Children below 10 years may attend along with one parent ) New participants: Sign up on the website to create your account Existing users: Log in and proceed with registration Registrations close on Saturday, 16th May 2026 (mid-night) A confirmation email will be sent after registration (please check spam/promotions if not received) Participants will be added to a WhatsApp group one day prior to the start date for session updates and Zoom links Recordings will be available for 24 hours only in the WhatsApp group For queries or registration support: 📧 office@sharan-india.org 📞 +91 9769117747 📞 +91 7499417038 Full refund for cancellations made at least 24 hours before the event No refund for cancellations on the day of the event Thank you for registering. short_description: Reclaim Your Health. Redesign Your Life.
full_text: Reclaim Your Health. Redesign Your Life. Join us for a life-changing, immersive experience designed to help you prevent and reverse chronic lifestyle diseases—naturally, sustainably, and without medication. This unique 21-day residential retreat combines evidence-based nutrition, expert guidance, and deep rest in one of India’s most healing coastal sanctuaries. Limited seats. Register early to secure your place. 21 days with Dr. Nandita Shah and SHARAN’s expert team Beautiful healing venue: SwaSwara, Om Beach, Gokarna Comprehensive wellness : doctor consults, yoga, meditation, nature walks, treks, aqua aerobics, swimming and swimming coaching, cooking classes, massage, art therapy, health talks and films, buffet meals and more This is more than a wellness getaway. It’s a step-by-step program designed to help you: Reverse or prevent lifestyle diseases like diabetes, hypertension, obesity, and more Shift to a healthy diet and whole food, plant-based lifestyle without confusion or overwhelm or a feeling of deprivation Enjoy healing meals, nature, and movement in a peaceful, coastal setting Experience powerful transformation—in body, mind, and spirit Daily health education sessions and interactive workshops Daily yoga, pranayama, and meditation classes Daily cooking classes to help you continue your healing at home One-on-one medical consultations and 2 sets of complete lab tests Treks, nature walks, exercise and fitness, aqua aerobics and swimming classes birdwatching, films, games, and art therapy, A caring community that supports your transformation Location : SwaSwara Health Resort, Om Beach, Gokarna, Karnataka Arrival by 2 PM at Goa Dabolim Airport or 6 PM at SwaSwara | Departure from SwaSwara by 12 noon on 30th June Are living with or at risk for lifestyle-related conditions Want to feel more energetic, lighter, and mentally clear Are a healthcare provider wanting to deepen your understanding of lifestyle medicine Are committed to making a long-term shift, but need expert support Individuals with psychiatric conditions or frequent medical emergencies Those requiring constant medical supervision or frequent hospitalisation Hundreds have experienced life-changing transformations through SHARAN’s retreats: “Within 3 weeks, my medications dropped, my energy rose, and I began living again—truly living.” – Subrato Saha “This retreat was not just about food. It was about reawakening to life with joy, purpose, and vitality.” – Nikhila Ramesh “I’ve never felt so deeply supported—physically, emotionally, and spiritually.” – Reena Nath

short_description: Feel better in your body. Clearer in your mind. Lighter in your life.
full_text: Feel better in your body. Clearer in your mind. Lighter in your life. If you’re tired of managing symptoms, depending on medicines, or starting routines that don’t last — you’re not lacking willpower. You may simply need the right environment and steady support. This 7-day residential retreat offers a calm, guided reset to help you change your lifestyle in a simple, practical way. Eating whole food plant-based meals confidently Participants have seen improvements in diabetes, hypertension, autoimmune concerns, and chronic stress — through consistent lifestyle change. Whole food plant-based, gluten-free meals You won’t just learn. You will practice. For those ready to change their lifestyle, open to plant-based eating, and willing to reflect honestly. Not for those seeking quick fixes without changing daily habits. All that’s needed is an open mind and willingness to begin. Dates: Monday, 4th – Tuesday 11th August 2026 Arrival: 2:00 PM on 4th Aug | Departure: 10:00 AM on 11th Aug Venue: The Hidden Oasis, Sai Ashram, 256, Garade Dharan, Garage Village, Off Khedshhivpur Sassed Link Road, Pune – 412301. (If sharing available otherwise difference in amount to be paid at venue) Imagine waking up without fear about your health. Feeling steady instead of anxious. Eating with confidence instead of doubt. Returning home lighter — not just physically, but emotionally. Not a new you. Just the healthier version of you — supported and clear. program_name: Whole Food Plant-Based Facilitator Training Program (Online)
short_description: Become a Certified Whole Food Plant Based Lifestyle Ambassador
full_text: Become a Certified Whole Food Plant Based Lifestyle Ambassador Are you following a Whole Food Plant-Based lifestyle? Have you experienced its life-changing benefits? Do you feel inspired to share this knowledge and transform lives? Since 2005, SHARAN has been at the forefront of health without medicines in India , and we are now inviting passionate individuals to join our mission. This exclusive facilitator training program is designed to empower you to share this message through high-impact talks and practical cooking classes using professionally designed materials and PowerPoint presentations. You may choose the module(s) best suited to your goals. Seats are very limited to ensure personalised learning and feedback. Upon successful completion, you will receive a SHARAN Certificate. You may apply to join the SHARAN team (subject to approval) or work independently under your own brand—becoming an effective ambassador for human health, the environment, and animals. 📽 Watch this 4 min 16 sec overview video You are well-versed with the Whole Food Plant-Based diet and the SHARAN lifestyle and have attended a few SHARAN programs. You personally follow a WFPB lifestyle and have experienced noticeable improvements in your own health. You may take Module 1, Module 2, or both. Designing and conducting engaging online or in-person classes Multiple practice rounds with personalised feedback Module 2 – Effective Presentation Skills Planning and structuring impactful talks Once registered, you will receive pre-program assignments (approx. 5–6 hours) by 2nd November 2026. Completion is mandatory. Dates: Thursday 12th November – Thursday 26th November 2026 (Orientation: Saturday, 7th November 2026 | 10:00–11:00 AM IST) NOTE: This is an intensive course requiring 2–3 hours daily for assignments & preparation. Last date to apply: Wednesday, 14th October 2026 Fill in the Application Form and email it to info@sharan-india.org by 14th October 2026. Pay the Application Fee: ₹9440 (incl. GST). If you are selected, the application fee becomes non-refundable and you will be asked to make the balance payment by 14th October 2026. After 14 Oct 2026, ₹9440 will be additionally charged per module (if seats available). Payment Options : Online / Cash / Cheque to A/c SHARAN (ICICI Bank, Nariman Point, Mumbai) Once you are accepted, please make the balance payment online or deposit cash or a cheque directly to our account in your local ICICI bank. The cheque must be in favour of A/c Name: SHARAN. Our bank details are Account Type: Current, Bank Name: ICICI Bank, A/c No. 000405113393, Branch: Nariman Point, Mumbai, IFSC Code: ICIC0000004. Full transfer (except application fee) if cancelled >7 days before start date 75% transfer if cancelled 7–3 days prior No refund for cancellations within 3 days 📧 office@sharan-india.org 📞 WhatsApp: Nupur +91 9167572123 | Roza +91 9769117747 Important: Participation does not guarantee an opportunity to work with SHARAN (but you will be well empowered to conduct your own programs). program_name: SHARAN Consultation Training for Doctors, Dieticians & Nutritionists
short_description: Heal Patients through Whole Food Plant-Based Nutrition
full_text: Heal Patients through Whole Food Plant-Based Nutrition This intensive workshop is specially designed for Doctors, Dieticians, and Nutritionists who wish to integrate plant-based nutrition into their clinical practice and help patients prevent and reverse lifestyle diseases. SHARAN has been a pioneer in whole food plant-based nutrition in India for over 20 years, with deep experience in consultations, lifestyle interventions, and patient outcomes. This training is limited to 12 participants to ensure personal attention and depth of learning. What You Will Learn The program provides: A structured format for conducting in-depth patient consultations Skills to understand patient needs holistically Practical tools to create comprehensive nutrition-based care plans Hands-on case studies (medical and nutritional) Guidance on reducing medications where medically feasible Soft skills, deep listening, and effective follow-up strategies Option to apply as a SHARAN consultant after successful completion* *Note: Acceptance into the SHARAN team is not guaranteed. Currently, SHARAN may add doctors to the team but does not have openings for additional nutritionists. Eligibility Criteria: Applicants must meet all of the following: Qualification Registered medical practitioner, registered dietician/nutritionist, or Holder of recognised qualifications in plant-based nutrition Registered medical practitioner, registered dietician/nutritionist, or Holder of recognised qualifications in plant-based nutrition Knowledge of SHARAN Nutrition Principles Through SHARAN online programs, Dr. Nandita Shah’s book, YouTube channel, website, etc. Personal Practice You must personally follow a whole food plant-based diet. Cooking Knowledge Reasonable understanding of healthy cooking to guide patients. Training Schedule (11 Half-Day Sessions) Time : 10:00 AM – 1:30 PM IST (may extend by 30 minutes if needed) Homework : Minimum 2 hours daily Breakout Rooms: Doctors & Nutritionists will be separated when required Challenges in whole plant-based consultations How to do a follow-up (Doctors & Nutritionists) Day 10 – Thursday, 7 January 2027 10:00 – 1:30: Follow-ups + Q&A Day 11 – Friday, 8 January 2027 10:00 – 1:30: Follow-ups + Q&A Dates: Wednesday, 2nd December 2026 – Friday, 11th December 2026 (Sunday, 6th December 2026 will be a holiday and break day), Thursday, 7th & Friday, 8th January 2027 Time for all sessions: 10:00 AM – 1:30 PM IST (may extend by 30 minutes if needed) For Repeaters (Anyone who has previously attended SHARAN Consultation Training and is joining for revision) New Participants: Sign up to create an account Pay the application fee: Rs. 5,000 + 900 GST = Rs. 5,900

program_name: Private Individualised and Customised Cooking Classes
short_description: Do you need our help in a personalised manner? Do you have a group that would like to embark on a health journey together? Perhaps you need one-on-one help in identifying unhealthy foods in your kitchen and replacing them with healthy alternatives? Or do you and your colleagues, friends or extended family wish to organise a tailored group cooking demo or health event?
full_text: Do you need our help in a personalised manner? Do you have a group that would like to embark on a health journey together? Perhaps you need one-on-one help in identifying unhealthy foods in your kitchen and replacing them with healthy alternatives? Or do you and your colleagues, friends or extended family wish to organise a tailored group cooking demo or health event? We can do all this for you and more. We can arrange house visits or customised healthy cooking classes according to your preference. We can even train your home cooks! All you need to do is share with us your requirement/your location and we will get back to you with a plan & price, and assign you a personal trainer(s). We currently have facilitators in Mumbai and Chennai all through the year, and as on need-basis in Dubai, Pune, Delhi and Bangalore. However, our facilitators from Mumbai can host these programmes in an area of your choice. Please note that you will bear the additional cost of their travel in case they are not available in your area. Please also be informed that the customised programs start at Rs 10,000 for a 2.5 hours session in the areas where we have facilitators. Individualised meets may cost more depending on your requirement. For group sessions, we would need more information to draw up a quote. Location: Ahmedabad, Bangalore, Chennai, Dubai, Mumbai, New Delhi, Pune Please call: +91 7208109161 or email manager@sharan-india.org with details. Rest assured, you will hear from us! Thank you for registering. Please check your email for the confirmation. You have already registered for this event.

short_description: With the rise in junk food consumption and health issues like PCOD, obesity, hypertension, heart attacks, depression, anxiety and more amongst the youth, it’s paramount to educate both parents and children on good health as early as possible. With SHARAN’s mission being building a culture of health, we would surely like to start young. We conduct health talks for parents and children of different age groups online plus physically in certain cities like Mumbai, Pune, Bangalore, Ahmedabad, Hyderabad, Dubai etc. So if you belong to a school or are a parent or connected with children and would like to organise this, do get in touch with us and let’s together make a healthier world.

short_description: Why not add a fun and healthy element in your next kitty? We can curate a fun time for you, include cooking demos, health games and even a delicious plant based meal.
full_text: Why not add a fun and healthy element in your next kitty? We can curate a fun time for you, include cooking demos, health games and even a delicious plant based meal. Surprise your buddies and do something different:) They will remember this experience for sure! This is possible in the below mentioned cities. All you need to do is share with us your requirement / your location and we will get back to you with a plan. This is what those who organised or attended a healthy kitty party had to say…. The party was awesome!! Happy that I thought of it & you & your team put together a wonderful evening – educative, fun & lovely food. Thanks to Shashji for being kind enough to have made a delicious healthy spread liked & relished by one & all. Thanks to Komal for sharing her experience with the talk with slides & answering all queries of everyone & giving suggestions & new ideas.The interactive session makes it interesting. The games were good too and the prizes a surprise made the day for the winners. – Host Sonia Masand, Mumbai It was a great super healthy kitty party yesterday. The presentation was very enlightening Glad to be a part of this group Thank you so much Soniaji for hosting a healthy kitty party – Kitty Party guest Location: Ahmedabad, Bangalore, Dubai, Hyderabad, Mumbai and Pune Please call : +91 7208109161 or email manager@sharan-india.org with details.
